# programs.yazi

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.yazi`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.yazi.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable yazi. |
| `programs.yazi.enableBashIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Bash integration. |
| `programs.yazi.enableFishIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Fish integration. |
| `programs.yazi.enableNushellIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Nushell integration. |
| `programs.yazi.enableZshIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Zsh integration. |
| `programs.yazi.extraPackages` | `list of package` | Extra packages to make available to yazi. These packages will be added to the yazi wrapper's PATH. |
| `programs.yazi.flavors` | `attribute set of (absolute path or package)` | Pre-made themes. Values should be a package or path containing the required files. Will be linked to {file}`$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/yazi/flavors/<name>.yazi`. See <https://yazi-rs.github.io/docs/flavors/overview/> for documentation. |
| `programs.yazi.initLua` | `null or absolute path or strings concatenated with "\n"` | The init.lua for Yazi itself. |
| `programs.yazi.keymap` | `TOML value` | Configuration written to {file}`$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/yazi/keymap.toml`. See <https://yazi-rs.github.io/docs/configuration/keymap> for the full list of options. |
| `programs.yazi.package` | `null or package` | The yazi package to use. |
| `programs.yazi.plugins` | `attribute set of ((submodule) or (absolute path or package) convertible to it)` | Lua plugins. Values can be a package or path (linked as-is), or an attribute set with {option}`package`, {option}`setup`, and {option}`settings`. Plugins with {option}`setup` set to {var}`true` generate a {command}`require("{name}"):setup({...})` call in {file}`$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/yazi/init.lua`, written before any {option}`initLua` content. See <https://yazi-rs.github.io/docs/plugins/overview> for documentation. |
| `programs.yazi.plugins.<name>.package` | `absolute path or package` | Package or path for the plugin. Will be linked to {file}`$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/yazi/plugins/<name>.yazi`. |
| `programs.yazi.plugins.<name>.settings` | `attribute set` | Attribute set passed to the plugin's {command}`setup()` as a Lua table (via {command}`lib.generators.toLua`). Values created with {command}`lib.generators.mkLuaInline` are rendered as raw Lua expressions. Only used when {option}`setup` is {var}`true`. When empty, {command}`setup()` is called with no arguments. |
| `programs.yazi.plugins.<name>.setup` | `boolean` | When {var}`true`, generates a {command}`require("{name}"):setup({...})` call in {file}`$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/yazi/init.lua`. |
| `programs.yazi.settings` | `TOML value` | Configuration written to {file}`$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/yazi/yazi.toml`. See <https://yazi-rs.github.io/docs/configuration/yazi> for the full list of options. |
| `programs.yazi.shellWrapperName` | `string` | Name of the shell wrapper to be called. |
| `programs.yazi.theme` | `TOML value` | Configuration written to {file}`$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/yazi/theme.toml`. See <https://yazi-rs.github.io/docs/configuration/theme> for the full list of options |
| `programs.yazi.vfs` | `TOML value` | Configuration written to {file}`$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/yazi/vfs.toml`. See <https://yazi-rs.github.io/docs/configuration/vfs> for the full list of options |
